G0.label:
case cons
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
γ : Type u_3
g : α → List β
f : β → γ
head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : map f (flatMap g tail✝) = flatMap (fun a => map f (g a)) tail✝
⊢ map f (flatMap g (head✝ :: tail✝)) = flatMap (fun a => map f (g a)) (head✝ :: tail✝)

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
γ : Type u_3
g : α → List β
f : β → γ
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : map f (flatMap g tail) = flatMap (fun a => map f (g a)) tail
⊢ map f (flatMap g (head :: tail)) = flatMap (fun a => map f (g a)) (head :: tail)
